category.name: Frozen
category.tagLine: Ice cream, frozen meat, seafood & more!

metaData.Ingredients:
• Noodle Cake: Wheat Flour, Palm Oil, Salt, Potassium Chloride, Guar Gum, Sodium Tripolyphosphate, Potassium Carbonate, Sodium Carbonate
• Soup Mix: Salt, Monosodium Glutamate, Palm Oil, Starch, Potassium Chloride, Sugar, Chilli, Wheat Flour, Yeast, Garlic, Maltodextrin, Coriander, Flavourings (contain soya), Sodium Inosinate and Sodium Guanylate, Onion, Cumin, Citric Acid, Aniseed, Tumeric, Caramel, Ginger, Fenugreek, Canola Oil, Clove, Cardamom, Nutmeg, Paprika Guar Gum, Anti-caking Agent (E551).
• May contain: Crustaceans, Fish, Milk, Celery and Mustard
metaData.Key Information: Made with 11 secret spices infused with real chillies that are slow cooked to perfection, it is no surprise why this is every Singaporeans’ favourite. Serve with fresh vegetables for a delicious and more balanced meal for the whole family.
metaData.Preparation:
Directions:
• For Soup
1. Bring 2 cups of water (350ml) to boil
2. Add in noodle cake, soup mix and protein & vegetables of your choice
3. Cook for 2 minutes and enjoy!
• For Dry
1. Cook noodle cake for 1 minute and drain off the water
2. Fry noodles with soup mix and protein & vegetables of your choice
3. Enjoy!

metaData.Ingredients: Wheat Flour, Salt, Sodium Carbonate, Soya Bean Oil, Permitted Food Colouring (E102)

metaData.Preparation:
• Udon Soup:
1. Add Udon noodles and preferred seasoning to 250ml of boiling water
2. Cook for 2 minutes, ready to serve
*Add your choice of meat and vegetables for better tasting noodles
• Fried Udon:
1. Stir fry your choice of meat and vegetables in oil
2. Add a bit of salt and pepper
3. Add in the Udon noodles and stir fry on low heat for about 2 minutes
4. Lastly, add soy sauce and oyster sauce to taste, ready to serve
metaData.Storage Information:
• Store in a cool, dry place
• Avoid direct sunlight

metaData.Ingredients:
• Noodle Cake: Wheat Flour, Palm Oil, Salt, Potassium Chloride, Guar Gum, Sodium Tripolyphosphate, Potassium Carbonate and Sodium Carbonate
• Soup Mix: Salt, Monosodium Glutamate, Sugar, Corn Starch, Flavourings (contains Milk), Chicken Fat and Meat, Soya Sauce (contains Wheat), Palm Oil, Leek, Onion, Garlic, Spices (contains Celery), Sodium Inosinate and Sodium Guanylate and Citric Acid
• May contain traces of crustaceans, fish, mustard
metaData.Key Information: Made with real chicken essence and a blend of aromatic herbs and spices, this truly is comfort food at its finest. Serve with fresh vegetables for a delicious and more balanced meal for the whole family.
metaData.Preparation:
Directions:
1. Empty noodles and soup mix into 360ml of boiling water
2. Simmer gently for 2 minutes
3. Serve immediately

metaData.Preparation:
Soup
Serves 1-2 (ready in 3-5 minutes)
1. Add your favourite soup base, meat, seafood and / or vegetables to 300ml of boiling water.
2. Add in FairPrice Udon and cook for 3 minutes, or until ingredients are fully cooked. Serve immediately.

Stir-fry
Serves 1-2 (ready in 8-10 minutes)
1. Blanch FairPrice Udon in boiling water for 2 minutes. Drain well and set aside.
2. Cook your favourite meat, seafood and / or vegetables in wok briefly.
3. Stir in udon and seasoning of your choice.
4. Cook for 3 minutes or until ingredients are fully cooked. Serve immediately.
metaData.Storage Information: Store in a cool dry place away from direct sunlight and heat. Recommended to be consumed within same day after opening from sealed pouch.

metaData.Key Information:
• No preservatives added
• Delicious and fresh tasting
• Cooks in 45 seconds and is ideal for dry, soup or fried cooking

metaData.Ingredients: Enriched Wheat Flour, Salt, Pure Vegetable Oil
metaData.Preparation:
1. Boil the water in the pan, put in the yee fu mee
2. Boil for 2-3 minutes, ready to serve

Palm Oil [Palm Olein, Anti-Oxidant (E320)], Onion, Sugar, Dried Prawns, Salt, Galangal, Flavour Enhancers (E621, E635), Garlic, Chilli, Lemongrass, Thickener [Water, Thickener (E1442)], Prawn Flavouring [Synthetic Flavouring, Natural Flavouring, Maltodextrin, Stabiliser (E1450), Flavouring Agents (E1518, E1520), Acidity Regulator (E260), Anti-Oxidant (E307)] and Colour (E160C).

Processed In A Facility That Also Processes Cereals Containing Gluten, Crustacean, Egg, Fish, Peanuts, Soybeans, Milk, Tree Nuts and Nuts Products.
metaData.Preparation:
1. Combine 1600ml Water with 200g Golden Chef Prawn Noodles Paste
2. Bring mixture to boil
3. Serve hot with blanched yellow noodles. Customise your bowl with your preferred toppings, such as tender blanched prawns and blanched vegetables. Enjoy!

1. In a pot combine 1600ml Water with 200g Golden Chef Prawn Noodles Paste
2. Bring the mixture to a boil
3. Serve hot with blanched yellow noodles. Add your favorite toppings: such as tender prawns , vegetables and more. Enjoy!

metaData.Preparation:
• For Soup Noodle:
1. Put Megah Mee into boiled soup and add your favourite ingredients eg. chicken meat, prawns, egg or vegetables etc
2. Simmer for 2 minutes and serve immediately
• For Fried Noodle:
1. Put Megah Mee into boiling water until loosen
2. Drain away water
3. Heat cooking oil in wok and Megah Mee, fry for a few minutes
4. Add seasoning and ingredients eg. chicken meat, prawns, egg or vegetables etc.
5. Serve hot

metaData.Preparation:
• Fried Mee Sua:
1. Quick fry the tai ann mee sua in boiling oil and remove
2. After it has softened in boiling soup, take out again and roast it with meat, vegetables, etc., as desired, until done
• Mee Sua Soup:
1. Cook tai ann mee sua in boiling water first
2. After stirring it loose with chopsticks, take out and put it in soup cooked with meat, vegetables, etc

1. Add egg noodles into 1000ml of boiling water
2. Cook the egg noodles in hot water until it is soft

metaData.Ingredients: Salt, Pansalt, Low Sodium, Water, Plain Wheat Flour
metaData.Preparation:
Directions:
• Cooking Method (1):
1. Wash the bean mee with cold water but do not soak it
2. Cook the bean mee with the prepared soup for 4 - 5 minutes
• Cooking Method (2):
1. Wash the bean mee and cook with boiling water for 4 - 5 minutes
2. Drain dry and fry with the prepared ingredients
• Cooking Method (3):
1. Immerse in boiling oil until it turns brownish
2. Drain dry, and mix in the prepared ingredients
